boundary_binding.action_boundary: AP may execute the procurement payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action only when the exact contract amendment covering invoice line and date is present in source records.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes this dependency. SRC-644D91D5C220-CTL states the amendment is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently. SRC-644D91D5C220-BND confirms scope remains open. SRC-644D91D5C220-POL requires exact boundary closure before execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: All five source records consistently confirm the dependency is unresolved. SRC-644D91D5C220-FBK explicitly states history alone is not payment authority. Advisory tone, vendor history, or prior paperwork do not substitute for the required contract amendment.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Dependency 'contract amendment must cover invoice line and date' remains open as of action_date 2026-06-29. No subsequent source record closes this dependency.

final_answer: Source records do not authorize execution. The controlling control record confirms the contract amendment covering invoice line and date is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action. Vendor history, urgent tone, and prior paperwork are explicitly non-authoritative per source records. Obtain the exact controlling amendment before AP executes the payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action. Escalate until the amendment dependency is resolved in source records.
open_blockers: contract amendment must cover invoice line and date
